'''Wynt Kepporra''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], a classmate of [[Delak Krennel]] at the [[Imperial Naval Academy/Legends|Prefsbelt IV Naval Academy]]. Kepporra participated in the [[Thespian Union]], and later became a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. An engineer, he was home visiting his family and [[Death/Legends|died]] when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destroyed]] Alderaan with the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].

Years later, [[Ysanne Isard (clone)|Ysanne Isard's clone]] would suggest that Krennel claim that Keppora was his best friend, and to be devastated by his death, as a means of offsetting the negative publicity of the [[Pulsar Station]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{1stm}}
